title: Dotfiles Configuration Schema
description: Schema for validating Go-based dotfile bootstrapper configurations in init/*.yaml files.

$schema.description: URL or local path to this JSON schema file for editor validation support.

groups.description: A list of installation groups to be processed sequentially.

Group.description: An installation group defines a set of tools share common properties like profile or system requirements.

name.description: The unique, human-readable name of the installation group.

profile.description: Filter by profile name (e.g., 'default', 'work', 'university'). The group is skipped if the active profile does not match.

systems.description: Filter by operating system (e.g., 'linux', 'darwin'). The group is skipped if the current OS matches neither.

apt.description: List of standard Debian/Ubuntu packages to install via apt-get.

items.description: The name of the apt package.

ppa.description: Personal Package Archives (PPAs) to be added in DEB822 format before installing packages.

snap.description: Ubuntu Snap packages to install. Supports both simple strings and detailed objects.

pipx.description: Python packages to install using pipx.

npm.description: Node.js packages to install globally using npm.

github_release.description: Binaries to download and install from GitHub Releases.

binary.description: Generic binary or archive downloads from a direct URL.

custom.description: Custom inline shell commands for complex installations with idempotency checks.

script.description: Execution of external script files located in the repository.

nvm.description: Node Version Manager (NVM) configurations for managing multiple Node.js versions.

sdkman.description: SdkMan configurations for managing JVM-based tools (Java, Gradle, Maven, Kotlin, etc.).

PPASpec.description: Configuration for an Ubuntu PPA (Personal Package Archive).

name.description: Unique identifier for the PPA source file (e.g., 'docker', 'hashicorp').

key.description: URL to the GPG armor key to download and use for signing.

key_server.description: Keyserver URL to fetch the GPG key from (e.g., 'hkp://keyserver.ubuntu.com:80'). Use with key_id.

key_id.description: The GPG Key ID to fetch from the specified keyserver.

uri.description: The repository URI. Supports the ':arch' placeholder which is replaced by the host architecture.

suites.description: The distribution suite (e.g., 'stable', 'noble'). Defaults to host distribution if omitted.

components.description: Repository components (e.g., 'main', 'multiverse'). Defaults to 'main' if omitted.

pkgs.description: List of packages to install after the PPA source is successfully added.

StringOrNamedObject.description: Supports either a simple string (the package name) or an object containing at least the 'name' property.

GithubSpec.description: Configuration for downloading a binary from a GitHub Release.

name.description: The name of the tool, used for verification via 'type'.

version.description: Specific tag name for the release. Defaults to 'latest'.

binaries.description: List of multiple binaries to extract from a single archive download.

asset_pattern.description: Regular expression pattern to identify the correct asset in the release (e.g., 'linux_amd64.tar.gz$').

binary_path.description: Relative path to the binary within the extracted archive. Not needed if name is in archive root.

install_path.description: Target directory for the binary. Defaults to /usr/local/bin if root, else ~/bin.

BinarySpec.description: Configuration for downloading a binary or archive from a direct URL.

name.description: The name of the tool, used for verification via 'type'.

url.description: Direct URL to the binary or archive. Supports the ':version' placeholder.

version.description: Version string used to replace the ':version' placeholder in the URL.

binaries.description: List of multiple binaries to extract if the URL points to an archive.

binary_path.description: Relative path to the binary within the extracted archive.

CustomSpec.description: Inline shell-based installation with idempotency checks.

name.description: Human-readable name for the custom task.

install.description: The shell command to execute for installation.

installCheck.description: A shell command used to verify if the tool is already installed. Exit code 0 means skip install.

ScriptSpec.description: Execution of an existing script file in the repository.

name.description: Human-readable name for the script execution.

script.description: Relative path from the repository root to the script file (e.g., './init/01-tools.sh').

NVMSpec.description: Configuration for installing and managing Node.js versions via NVM (Node Version Manager).

default.description: The default Node.js version to use. Automatically installed if not present. Examples: 'lts/iron', 'latest', '18', '20.11.0'.

versions.description: Additional Node.js versions to install. The default version is automatically included, so it doesn't need to be listed here.

oneOf.description: Simple format: 'candidate:version' (e.g., 'java:17.0.2-tem', 'maven:3.9.6'). Installs the specified version and sets it as default.
Detailed configuration for installing and managing SDK versions via SdkMan.

version.description: The default version to install and use. Examples: '17.0.2-tem', '8.5', '3.9.6'.

versions.description: Additional versions to install. If 'version' is specified, it's set as default. Otherwise, the first item in this array becomes the default.
